notes: Engagement: removed 'claude' from BOT_NAMES regex — general AI discussion no longer triggers classifier
Engagement: removed LQuorum topic injection from classifier prompt — 0.6B model no longer biased by topic hints
Routing: keyword rules now fire before complexity detection — prevents misrouting of known commands like 'overnight report'
Dedup: message deduplication via 200-entry ID ring buffer — prevents double-responses from Baileys
Quality: Opus critique stripping hardened — uses --- divider detection instead of fragile regex denylist
Quality: comprehensive anti-slop rules in system prompt — banned phrases, banned structures, substance requirements
Quality: Opus gate prompt aligned with anti-slop rules — structural, language, and substance slop categories
Dream: orientation phase — reads existing memories before generating diary (prevents duplicate extraction)
Dream: pre-store dedup + contradiction detection — skips duplicates, supersedes stale facts
Dream: stale memory pruning — machine-extracted memories older than 30 days with low access pruned nightly
Dream: verbatim excerpt storage — exact quotes preserved alongside lossy diary summaries
Evolution: Claude Code CLI installed on EVO (v2.1.81) — headless self-coding in git branches
Evolution: evolution_task WhatsApp tool — owner creates coding tasks via chat
Evolution: DM approval flow — diff sent to owner, must approve before deploy
Evolution: auto-deploy with health check and rollback on failure
Evolution: HTTP endpoint for dream mode to create coding tasks autonomously
Infra: Tailscale on Pi + EVO — SSH from anywhere without LAN
Docs: comprehensive README, updated CLAUDE.md (16 new design decisions), updated architecture.md (full file tree, data files, EVO services)
